hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|--force push|truncate|DELETE FROM.*WHERE 1|composio.*delete' && { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Destructive command blocked. Use safer alternatives."}' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
cd backend && uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true
cd frontend && pnpm biome format --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"additionalContext": "Branch: '$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo detached)' | Last commit: '$(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo none)' | Uncommitted: '$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " ")' files | Python: '$(python3 --version 2>/dev/null)' | Node: '$(node --version 2>/dev/null)'"}'
echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'): session ended on branch $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" >> ~/.omni-copilot-work.log
